collections.label: Dishes
collections.description: A dish on the kitchen menu — a photo, a name, and a short description.

data.name: Sample Dish (edit or delete me)
data.description: This is the one seeded example dish — it documents the Dish format: a photo, a name, and a short description. Add your real dishes in the EmDash admin (upload a photo to the media library, write a name and description), then edit or delete this one. The menu render is built by your first vend drive.
